display.purpose: Empty-state heroes, welcome screens, and large confirmation moments.

headline.purpose: Page titles, modal headers, and major section heads.

title.purpose: Card titles, list section headers, and form group labels.

body.purpose: Primary reading text; cap long prose at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Buttons, input labels, badges, and tab labels.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Default shadow for cards and grouped content in light mode.

shadows.name: sidebar-active
shadows.purpose: Selected sidebar item in light mode.

shadows.name: sidebar-active-hover
shadows.purpose: Selected sidebar item hover — harder than the resting selected state.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The default action button. Borderless, gradient-filled, with an internal glow on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2rem; padding: 0 1.25rem; border: 0; border-radius: 0.8rem; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: #fff; background-image: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--gradient-button-start), var(--gradient-button-end)); box-shadow: var(--shadow-button); transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-button-hover); filter: brightness(1.02); } .ds-btn-primary::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: inherit; opacity: 0; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 1px oklch(from var(--glow-internal-color) l c h / 0.15), inset 0 0 20px oklch(from var(--glow-internal-color) l c h / var(--glow-internal-opacity)); transition: opacity 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); pointer-events: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover::after { opacity: 1; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Lower-emphasis action button using the muted surface color.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2rem; padding: 0 1.25rem; border: 0; border-radius: 0.8rem; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--foreground); background-color: var(--secondary); transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--secondary), var(--foreground) 5%); }

components.name: Card
components.description: A bordered, shadowed container. Always has both a border and a shadow.
components.html:
Card title
Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 1rem; background-color: var(--card); color: var(--card-foreground); box-shadow: var(--shadow-card); font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; padding: 1rem 0; } .ds-card-header { padding: 0 1rem; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-content { padding: 0 1rem; }

components.name: Input
components.description: A transparent field with a subtle border and Soft Sage focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--input); border-radius: 0.8rem; background-color: transparent; color: var(--foreground); font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.4; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--ring); }

components.name: Sidebar Selected Item
components.description: The active navigation item in the sidebar. Uses primary fill, gradient overlay, and a harder shadow on hover.
components.css: .ds-sidebar-item { position: relative; display: flex; width: 100%; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 0.625rem; padding: 0.5rem; text-align: left; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--sidebar-foreground); background-color: transparent; border: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { background-color: var(--sidebar-accent); color: var(--sidebar-accent-foreground); } .ds-sidebar-item--active { color: var(--sidebar-primary-foreground); background-color: var(--sidebar-primary); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sidebar-active); } .ds-sidebar-item--active::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background-image: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--gradient-button-start), var(--gradient-button-end)); opacity: 0.4; pointer-events: none; } .ds-sidebar-item--active:hover { filter: brightness(1.05); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sidebar-active-hover); } .ds-sidebar-item--active:hover::before { opacity: 0.5; } .ds-icon { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Sidebar Default Item
components.description: An inactive navigation item in the sidebar.
components.css: .ds-sidebar-item { position: relative; display: flex; width: 100%; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 0.625rem; padding: 0.5rem; text-align: left; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--sidebar-foreground); background-color: transparent; border: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { background-color: var(--sidebar-accent); color: var(--sidebar-accent-foreground); } .ds-icon { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; flex-shrink: 0; }

narrative.overview: Prometheus is built around the idea of a ledger that feels calm before it feels clever. The interface is soft, rounded, and warm without drifting into decorative pastels. Color is restrained, type is clear, and every interactive surface responds with a small, purposeful lift. The personality is still sharp, modern, and private — but the visual translation is now warmer and more tactile than the earlier high-contrast system. The design rejects the clichés of both finance software and AI products. It is not a corporate banking portal, not a spreadsheet with a fresh coat of paint, and not a chat window that happens to do bookkeeping.
keyCharacteristics: Locked Soft preset: the active visual system is the soft preset for both light and dark modes.
Warm tinted neutrals: backgrounds carry a whisper of warm-neutral hue.
Tactile components: buttons have internal gradient and glow; cards always have borders and shadows.
Internal glows, not outer auras: glow and gradient effects live inside components.
Type-driven hierarchy: one type family (Inter Variable) carries every role.
Mobile-native spacing: touch targets and bottom-sheet thinking are designed for the phone first.

rules.name: The Soft-Default Rule
rules.body: The soft preset is the only active visual preset. Preset configs for sharp, glow, and midnight remain in code for future use but must not be surfaced to users.

rules.name: The Green Sparingly Rule
rules.body: Soft Sage appears on no more than 10% of any given screen. Its rarity is what makes it signal action.

rules.name: The Warm-Not-Cream Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds are warm-tinted neutrals, not pure white or beige cream. The warmth is subtle (OKLCH chroma < 0.02) and consistent across surfaces.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Inter Variable carries every typographic role. No secondary display font, no mono for decoration, no mixing of similar sans-serifs.

rules.name: The Fixed Step Rule
rules.body: Type sizes are fixed rem values, not fluid clamps. Product UI is viewed at consistent device sizes.

rules.name: The Internal-Glow Rule
rules.body: Glow effects are inset or carried by internal gradients. Never cast a colored outer glow as a decorative atmosphere.

rules.name: The Shadow-As-Response Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear as a response to elevation or interaction, not as a default texture. Flat at rest, lifted on demand.

dos: Do keep the active visual preset locked to soft for both light and dark modes.
Do use Soft Sage only for primary actions, active navigation, focus rings, and the most important status indicators.
Do give every card a border and a shadow.
Do make primary buttons borderless (border-0) with an internal gradient fill and internal glow on hover.
Do design every screen so it works without voice or chat — traditional forms and buttons are the baseline.
Do show currency explicitly next to every monetary value; never rely on context alone.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion by disabling non-essential transitions and animations.
Do cap body prose at 65–75ch for readability.
Do make the selected sidebar item visually distinct from hover, using primary fill, gradient overlay, and a harder shadow on selected-hover.
donts: Don't expose preset switching in the UI; the PresetSwitcher component is currently unused.
Don't use a chat-only AI widget pattern; every voice/text feature must also be reachable through forms and buttons.
Don't use side-stripe borders greater than 1px as colored accents on cards or list items.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism as a default, or decorative blur for atmosphere.
Don't rely on color alone to communicate status, budget health, or required fields.
Don't cast colored outer glows as decorative shadows.
Don't let hover on a selected item look identical to hover on an unselected item.
Don't ship components with missing hover, focus, active, disabled, or loading states.
